Centaur archer cantering forward, bow raised high, chestnut coat gleaming, quiver strapped to human torso, tail streaming.

Wasteland bandit shielding eyes from sandstorm, tattered scarf wrapped tight, makeshift armor rusted, shotgun strapped to dusty back.

Farmer wiping brow in golden wheat field, pitchfork resting on shoulder, straw hat tilted back, harvest basket overflowing.
Shepherd leaning on crook staff, woolen cloak draped loosely, flock grazing behind, loyal dog sitting alert at feet.
Librarian reaching for dusty tome on high shelf, spectacles perched on nose, cardigan buttoned, ladder creaking beneath slippers.
Ghost-hunter gripping spectral trap device, proton pack humming on back, goggles detecting ectoplasm, determined expression set firm.

Rogue scaling stone rooftop edge, grappling hook secured above, black cloak billowing, moonlight catching throwing daggers strapped to thigh.

Forest-spirit materializing from tree trunk, bark-textured skin glowing green, antlers sprouting flowers, ethereal mist pooling at roots below.
